description: A plain screenshot of a news article's headline and standfirst/subhead on a white background, with no agency design, seal, logo or graphic treatment. The bold dark sans-serif headline reads 'Trade school enrollment for young adults on the rise nationwide' and the lighter-gray subhead beneath reads 'One in three adults recommending trade school over a four-year university to high school grads.' It is cropped article text with no designed overlay or branding. The accompanying tweet includes the phrase 'The Golden Age of SKILLED TRADES!'
